channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 4A/77A/80A: traffic congestion
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Line 77A: irregular intervals in both directions. [On 26.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Line 77A: irregular intervals in both directions.
[On 26.05.2026]

item.title: 60: defective vehicle
item.description: No operation between Hofwiesengasse and Hietzing U. Substitute for the lines 10, 56A and 56B. expected duration: 0730 watch. Reason: Harmful … [On 26.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
No operation between Hofwiesengasse and Hietzing U. Substitute for the lines 10, 56A and 56B. expected duration: 0730 watch. Reason: Harmful …
[On 26.05.2026]
